title: anthemis mauritiana subsp. mauritiana
intro: Anthemis mauritiana subsp. mauritiana is a subspecies of the anthemis plant, commonly known as the yellow chamomile, which is a flowering plant native to the Indian Ocean islands. The medicinal properties of Anthemis mauritiana subsp. mauritiana include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate menstrual cramps and other female reproductive problems. The herbal preparations of Anthemis mauritiana subsp. mauritiana include tea infusions, essential oil extracts, and dried flower infusions, which can be used in traditional medicine or as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
